result.summary: CarMax exposes a public MCP server at `https://apim.carmax.com/chatgpt-connector/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface could be verified on `carmax.com`.
result.description: CarMax is a used-car retailer that lets customers shop, finance, sell, and research vehicles online and in stores. Its public website focuses on consumer car-buying and selling services.
